title: mespilus pentagyna var. celsiana
intro: Mespilus pentagyna var. celsiana, also known as European white hawthorn, is a variety of the white hawthorn tree (Mespilus germanica), a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic properties. The health benefits of Mespilus pentagyna var. celsiana include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make cardiovascular tonic, anti-inflammatory remedies, and other herbal treatments.
